feed.title: Bare Metal Cloud Status - Incident History

entry.title: [BHS6] [Dedicated Servers] - T06C22 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Mar 23, 11:00 - 12:00 UTC

Feb 24, 15:06 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Start time : 23/03/2026 11:00 UTC
End time : 23/03/2026 12:00 UTC
Service impact : VRack on T06C22 will be unavailable during maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack L102A11 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Mar 20, 02:00 - 03:00 UTC

Feb 20, 16:50 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer, affecting servers in rack L102A11.

Start time : 20/03/2026 02:00 UTC
End time : 20/03/2026 03:00 UTC
Service impact : Public network will be temporarily unavailable during the maintenance for servers in L102A11.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on a network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [RBX2] [Dedicated Servers] - 24C20 maintenance notification
entry.content:

entry.title: [BHS1][Cooling System] - Rack T02B72 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Mar 9, 11:00 - 19:00 UTC

Mar 3, 09:38 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure in rack T02B72.

Start time : 09/03/2026 11:00 UTC
End time : 09/03/2026 19:00 UTC

Service impact : During this maintenance, the cooling system's efficiency may be temporarily reduced for some servers, potentially lowering performance. Despite ongoing mitigation efforts, customers could still experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA2][Dedicated Servers] - Rack G253A05 incident notification
entry.content:
Mar 3, 14:44 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific rack G253A05.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 03/03/2026 14:30 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some servers in the rack G253A05 are temporarily unavailable.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA4][Dedicated Servers] - Rack GRA0404E04B incident notification
entry.content:
Mar 3, 13:58 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers has been resolved.

Start time : 03/03/2026 13:06 UTC
End time : 03/03/2026 13:57 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 3, 13:52 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : The majority of the servers are now operational again.
Ongoing Actions : Our team is working to restore the remaining servers as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 3, 13:29 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific rack GRA0404E04B.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 03/03/2026 13:06 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the rack GRA0404E04B are temporarily unavailable.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [EU-WEST-LZ-BRU/EU-SOUTH-LZ-MAD][Virtual Private Servers] - VPS incident notification
entry.content:
Mar 3, 13:09 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Virtual Private Servers offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in EU-WEST-LZ-BRU and EU-SOUTH-LZ-MAD regions.

Here are some supplementary details :
Start time : 25/02/2026 10:48 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some VPS instances are experiencing difficulties with restarting or rebuilding.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Start time : 02/03/2026 20:00 UTC
End time : 02/03/2026 20:52 UTC

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 2, 20:56 UTC

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : The rack G118B09 is also affected by this faulty network equipment.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 2, 20:31 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Our teams will need to reload the faulty network equipment.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 2, 20:28 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific room G108/G118.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 02/03/2026 20:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in the following racks are no longer able to access the vRack network. Impacted racks : G108A14 G108A15 G108A16 G108B04 G108B05 G108B06 G108B10 G108B11 G108B19 G118B02 G118B03 G118B06 G118B10 G118B12 G118B13 G118B14 G118B15 G118B16.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers via vRack network located on the specified racks.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a network equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

entry.title: [RBX8][Dedicated Servers] - Racks R802R04/R802R05/R802R06 Incident Notification
entry.content:
Mar 2, 15:21 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers in R802R04/R802R05/R802R06 has been resolved.

Start time : 02/03/2026 13:44 UTC
End time : 02/03/2026 15:15 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a cooling system issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Mar 2, 14:52 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer in racks R802R04/R802R05/R802R06.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 27/02/2026 13:44 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The IPMI switches are inaccessible in racks R802R04/R802R05/R802R06.
Customers Impact : Customers cannot currently access their servers via the IPMI interface.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.
